variants: Samantha Kingston currently resides in Dogwood Star, having grown up in Quartzbloom Fields. She completed her education at the Northgate Institute of Commerce, which prepared her well for her professional path. Now a key asset at Lantern Quark Robotics, she has played a vital role in numerous projects. Her exemplary work within the company has been recognized with the Resonance Orb Citation, an honor that reflects her impactful contributions to the field of robotics.
